3290100.name: MoonLit Journey: The Age of Deth
3290100.description:
Join us on an Epic Journey into the warped minds of life long gamers who are creating a nostalgic game, setting the player deep into a fantasy realm with a rich story line and many interactive features.

-Features Included

  • Sail through the seas while setting out on multiple quest lines

  • Libraries that contain important information and stories for the player to enjoy

  • Merchants to provide supplies to the player

  • Turn based battle

  • Ore collection, The ore will be used for something that will be revealed in the game

  • Explore the vast lands and unlock secret areas 

  • A main questline with optional Side quest

  • One major choice based scenario

  • Multiple music tracks and epic sound effects

  • An interactive inventory and world map

Join us as we unite to restore Law and Chaos
3290100.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
